Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx basic,$0801,$ffff "COMBATZONE-ALTERNATIVE-0810" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Combat Zone (Alternative Software).prg"
Metadata.Notes:
This game had a bug which caused garbage to be written to screen ram at $0748 (over the letter F of FUEL) after a while whilst waiting for the fire button to start the game. This was fixed by changing the BNE $1604 instruction at $15E1 to BNE $1602.
The loading screen is from the Spectrum version
